query_normalized: the impact of social comparison on self-perception in ai-generated image platforms psychology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring the dependent variable "low self-esteem" (a core component of self-perception) within the user's specified domain of social media platforms (Reddit), providing essential empirical data on the psychological outcomes relevant to the user's question.
